name: 05-23-stage2-rvv-elementwise-select-route-family-owner-registry
title: Stage2 RVV elementwise/select route-family owner registry extraction
description: Extract or regularize an RVV plugin-local route-family owner registry for the mature non-memory elementwise/select cluster and make the production provider consume the aggregate owner boundary without changing route semantics or adding coverage.
